titleStmt.title: SII 25.219: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 219. (A.R. No. 219 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the first prākāra of the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This inscription may be assigned to c. 14th century on palaeographical considerations.
It refers to an order (ōlai) of the mahāsabhai of Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam issued on the fifth day of the month Tai of the above year.

It records the a gift of 30 kalam of paddy as maḍakku from out of 18 mā of lands separated from the above village in the name of Kūttāḍumnāyaganallūr as maḍappuṟam to the Śaiva teacher. This arrangement (vyavasthai) of the nāṭṭavar, made at the instance of nāṭṭukkaṇakku Perujñār-kiḻavar Kōvāṇa[yā]r was attested by Rājamahēndrappiḷḷai, ūr-kaṇakku Śēṟṟūr-uḍaiyāṉ Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷappiriyaṉ and several others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī yāṇṭu patiṉālāvatu taimāsattu Aiñcāntiyati nāḷ Ucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷakulāśanicaturvvedi maṅkalattu hāsabhaiyom Olai . nāṭṭuk kaṇakku peruñārkiḻavar kovāṇayār kaṇṭu mutaliyār periṭam peruka niṉṟārku śrīrājamahendrap piḷḷaiyaṉ Eḻuttu
pereriyil melaittalaip parappil maṭappuṟamāka nāṅkaḷ Eṭṭāvatu nāḷil viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam patiṉaiñcum māvum Iṟṟaināḷ vaṭameṟkum teṉmaruṅkalum viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam muṉṟumāvum mikutik kuṟaivu viṭṭa nilam patiṉ Eṭṭumāvum Eṅkaḷ Ūril niṉṟum viṟittu kūttāṭum nāyaka nallūr Eṉṟu perāl veṟu piṟittu Inta nila ṭṭu māvukku paṉṉiraṇṭāntarattu tarappaṭi
maṭakkāl varum nellu muppatiṉ kalamum nāṭṭavar paṇṇiṉa vyavasthaippaṭiye nāṭṭile kāṭṭikkoṇṭu Iṟuppittu koḷḷavum coṉṉom paṇippāl Ippaṭikku Ivai Ūr kaṇakku ceṟṟūr Uṭaiyāṉaḻakiya maṇavāḷappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaḷattūr govin=tapaṭṭaṉ Eṭṭukkūr nārāyaṇa paṭṭan Eḻu
Ippaṭikku Ivai tirunalakaṇṭaṉ Āḷuṭaiyāṉ bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai kaḷattūr Aiyya perumāṉ paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai tirukkaṭavar tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikkivai sūryyadeva paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai poṉṉampala paṭṭan Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 25.219 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
